title: Welcome to my blog
body:
This is my new blog. It lives on **GitHub Pages**, which means it's free, it's mine, and nobody can take it offline.

I'll post writing, audio, PDFs, and links here whenever I want. To add a new post, I just edit one file — `posts.json` — and GitHub publishes it automatically within a minute or two.

For formatting, I can use **bold**, *italic*, and [links like this](https://example.com).

title: Example audio post
body:
Here's how an audio post looks. Put your MP3 in the `media/` folder, then reference it in `posts.json`.

The audio player works on desktop and mobile, and there's a download link for listeners who want a copy.

title: Example PDF post
body: PDFs are embedded right in the page so readers can preview them, and there's a link to open the full file in a new tab.
